languages.text: "Зафиксировано отрицательное отклонение от оптимального исхода. Совокупная полнота знания снижена. Омниссия скорбит об этой потере!" {n}В торжественном голосе Тетрии-Леммы сложно уловить какую-либо интонацию, но последующий бинарный возглас кажется действительно печальным.{/n}

"Negative deviation from the optimal outcome has been registered. The cumulative completeness of knowledge has been reduced. The Omnissiah mourns this loss!" {n}It is difficult to catch any intonation in Tetria-Lemma's solemn voice, but the binharic exclamation that follows seems genuinely sorrowful.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Зафиксировано отрицательное отклонение от оптимального исхода. Совокупная полнота знания снижена. Омниссия скорбит об этой потере!" {n}В торжественном голосе Тетрии-Леммы сложно уловить какую-либо интонацию, но последующий бинарный возглас кажется действительно печальным.{/n}

"Negative deviation from the optimal outcome has been registered. The cumulative completeness of knowledge has been reduced. The Omnissiah mourns this loss!" {n}It is difficult to catch any intonation in Tetria-Lemma's solemn voice, but the binharic exclamation that follows seems genuinely sorrowful.{/n}

languages.text: 「最適な結果から逸脱が記録されました。知識の累積的完全性が低下しました。オムニシアはこの損失を悼みます！」{n}テトリヤ・レマの厳粛な声には、どのイントネーションも捉えにくいですが、続く二音節の悲嘆は、本物の悲しみのように感じられます。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Negative deviation from the optimal outcome has been registered. The cumulative completeness of knowledge has been reduced. The Omnissiah mourns this loss!" {n}It is difficult to catch any intonation in Tetria-Lemma's solemn voice, but the binharic exclamation that follows seems genuinely sorrowful.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「最適な結果から逸脱が記録されました。知識の累積的完全性が低下しました。オムニシアはこの損失を悼みます！」{n}テトリヤ・レマの厳粛な声には、どのイントネーションも捉えにくいですが、続く二音節の悲嘆は、本物の悲しみのように感じられます。{/n}

languages.text: «Se registra un desvío negativo del resultado óptimo. La recopilación acumulativa de conocimiento se ha reducido. ¡El Omnissiah llora esta pérdida!». {n}Cuesta distinguir el tono de la solemne voz de Tetria-Lemma, pero la exclamación en binario que le sigue parece apesadumbrada.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Negative deviation from the optimal outcome has been registered. The cumulative completeness of knowledge has been reduced. The Omnissiah mourns this loss!" {n}It is difficult to catch any intonation in Tetria-Lemma's solemn voice, but the binharic exclamation that follows seems genuinely sorrowful.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Se registra un desvío negativo del resultado óptimo. La recopilación acumulativa de conocimiento se ha reducido. ¡El Omnissiah llora esta pérdida!». {n}Cuesta distinguir el tono de la solemne voz de Tetria-Lemma, pero la exclamación en binario que le sigue parece apesadumbrada.{/n}

languages.text: "Negative Abweichung von optimalem Ergebnis wurde registriert. Kumulative Vollständigkeit von Wissen wurde reduziert. Der Omnissiah beklagt diesen Verlust!" {n}Es ist schwierig, in Tetria-Lemmas feierlicher Stimme eine Intonation zu erkennen, aber der folgende binhärische Ausruf klingt aufrichtig besorgt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Negative deviation from the optimal outcome has been registered. The cumulative completeness of knowledge has been reduced. The Omnissiah mourns this loss!" {n}It is difficult to catch any intonation in Tetria-Lemma's solemn voice, but the binharic exclamation that follows seems genuinely sorrowful.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Negative Abweichung von optimalem Ergebnis wurde registriert. Kumulative Vollständigkeit von Wissen wurde reduziert. Der Omnissiah beklagt diesen Verlust!" {n}Es ist schwierig, in Tetria-Lemmas feierlicher Stimme eine Intonation zu erkennen, aber der folgende binhärische Ausruf klingt aufrichtig besorgt.{/n}

languages.text: « Une déviation négative du résultat optimal a été constatée. La complétion cumulative de la connaissance a été revue à la baisse. L'Omnimessie porte le deuil de cette perte ! » {n}Le ton solennel de Tetria-Lemma ne laisse pas transparaître la moindre intonation, mais l'exclamation binhaire qui ponctue sa dernière phrase laisse entrevoir son désespoir.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Negative deviation from the optimal outcome has been registered. The cumulative completeness of knowledge has been reduced. The Omnissiah mourns this loss!" {n}It is difficult to catch any intonation in Tetria-Lemma's solemn voice, but the binharic exclamation that follows seems genuinely sorrowful.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Une déviation négative du résultat optimal a été constatée. La complétion cumulative de la connaissance a été revue à la baisse. L'Omnimessie porte le deuil de cette perte ! » {n}Le ton solennel de Tetria-Lemma ne laisse pas transparaître la moindre intonation, mais l'exclamation binhaire qui ponctue sa dernière phrase laisse entrevoir son désespoir.{/n}

languages.text: “已记录偏离最优结果的负向偏差。知识总体完整度已降低。欧姆尼赛亚为这一损失而哀悼！”{n}你很难从特特里亚-莱玛肃穆的语调中捕捉到任何情绪，但其随后那段二进制感叹听上去充满了悲伤。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Negative deviation from the optimal outcome has been registered. The cumulative completeness of knowledge has been reduced. The Omnissiah mourns this loss!" {n}It is difficult to catch any intonation in Tetria-Lemma's solemn voice, but the binharic exclamation that follows seems genuinely sorrowful.{/n}

languages.text: "Optimal sonuçtan negatif sapma kaydedildi. İrfanın kümülatif bütünlüğü azaldı. Hermesih bu kayıp için yas tutuyor!" {n}Tetria-Lemma'nın ciddi sesinde herhangi bir tonlama yakalamak zor olsa da ardından gelen ikilidil haykırış, gerçekten kederli görünüyor.{/n}
